description_long: This is a traditional axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle and a heavy, wedge-shaped metal head. The handle appears to be made from a light-colored hardwood, showing a natural grain and a smooth, ergonomic contour for comfortable gripping. The axe head is forged from dark, weathered steel, with a broad, single-edged blade and a flat poll on the opposite side, suitable for striking. The blade edge is straight and wide, designed for chopping or splitting wood, while the poll is squared off and solid. The head is securely mounted onto the handle using a traditional wedged fit, with no visible modern fasteners. There are no visible markings, engravings, or labels on either the handle or the blade.
description: A classic axe with a light wooden handle and a broad, dark metal blade, featuring a straight edge and a flat poll. The design is utilitarian and robust, with no visible markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden handle and the wedge-shaped metal blade with a straight edge.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the thickness of the blade and the width of the handle's grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle's curvature and the flat poll of the axe head.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the axe head and the end of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Slightly curved wooden handle, smooth finish, oval cross-section, ergonomic grip, traditional style.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, wedge-shaped steel blade with a straight cutting edge and a flat poll; no decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged fit, blade mounted onto handle with no visible fasteners.
